title: myriopteris parryi
intro: Myriopteris parryi, also known as Parry's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myriopteris parryi include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and lower cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Myriopteris parryi include tea infusions and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
